name: Resend
tagline: Transactional email for developers, with React-based templates.
security: Keep RESEND_API_KEY server-only — never expose to the browser.
Verify the domain you send from with SPF, DKIM, and DMARC before going to production.
Verify webhook signatures using Svix headers when handling event callbacks.
Throttle outbound sends per-user to mitigate abuse on signup or password-reset endpoints.
Never put user-controlled HTML into email templates without sanitization.

patterns.name: React Email templates
patterns.description: Author email templates as React components and render them with the React Email package.

patterns.name: Transactional send
patterns.description: Send one-off transactional emails (welcome, receipt, password reset) from a server action or route handler.

patterns.name: Delivery webhook
patterns.description: Receive email.delivered / bounced / complained events and update user state.

triggers.name: Email delivered
triggers.description: Fires when a sent email is delivered to the recipient inbox.

triggers.name: Email bounced
triggers.description: Fires when an email bounces (hard or soft).

triggers.name: Email complained
triggers.description: Fires when a recipient marks the email as spam.

triggers.name: Email opened
triggers.description: Fires when a recipient opens the email (tracking pixel).

triggers.name: Email link clicked
triggers.description: Fires when a recipient clicks a tracked link in the email.

actions.name: Send email
actions.description: Send a transactional email (HTML or React Email template).

actions.name: Add contact to audience
actions.description: Add an email to a Resend Audience for newsletters/waitlists.

actions.name: Remove contact from audience
actions.description: Remove an email from a Resend Audience.

actions.name: Send batch emails
actions.description: Send up to 100 emails in a single API call.

auth.description: Server-side API key (re_…) for the Resend REST API.
Svix webhook signing secret for verifying email event deliveries.
